title: Deepblue
description: Ocean-focused full-stack web app built at SparkHacks 2025 — JavaScript and CSS with a Node.js dev server.
overview: An ocean-focused web application built at SparkHacks 2025. Deepblue is built with JavaScript and CSS, with a Node.js backend, centered around ocean awareness and interactive data visualization.

sections.heading: What I Built
bullets: Built a full-stack web application from scratch within a hackathon timeframe
Designed and developed the frontend using JavaScript and CSS with responsive layouts
Set up a Node.js dev server with npm for local development and rapid iteration
Focused on ocean-themed UI with data-driven content presentation
